prompt: An extreme top-down god's-eye perspective looking directly down at a vast, glowing ancient Chinese city extending to the horizon, where the curvature of the planet is visible. In the foreground, a lone swordsman in traditional robes stands on the edge of an ornate, dark-tiled ancient palace roof, looking down. Below lies an endless sea of ancient architecture illuminated by warm glowing lights, bustling streets, and dense crowds. Soft mist and fog layers drift through the sprawling metropolis. Photorealistic fantasy concept art, Chinese Xianxia aesthetics, extreme wide angle, massive depth of field. Grand, lonely, and poetic atmosphere with strong color contrast and a moody dark blue and warm gold color palette.
